meanings.usage: 指叙述性的事件，可真实或虚构
指事件的发生，主语是事件
英式英语中指手电筒，美式英语多用flashlight
表示情况发生得很意外、迅速
指人说话或喊叫的声音
指不悦耳的声音或嘈杂声
一种会模仿人说话的鸟类
表示向楼下或位于楼下的位置

phrases.usage: 用于强调故事是真实的而非虚构的

examples.en: I want to tell you a true story.
examples.zh: 我想给你讲一个真实的故事。

phrases.usage: 表示某人是说话者的朋友之一

examples.en: It happened to a friend of mine.
examples.zh: 它发生在我一个朋友身上。

phrases.usage: 表示爬进（较小的空间或物体内部）

examples.en: Two thieves climbed into his kitchen.
examples.zh: 两个贼爬进了他的厨房。

phrases.usage: 表示打开（电器、灯、水龙头等）
口语中常用的问候语，意为'怎么了？'或'有什么事？'
表示尽可能快地，强调尽最大努力

examples.en: The thieves ran away as quickly as they could.
George heard the noise and came downstairs quickly.
examples.zh: 乔治听到声音后迅速下楼。

phrases.usage: 指向某人大声喊叫或叫喊

examples.en: Who called out to the thieves in the dark?
examples.zh: 谁在黑暗中向贼们大声喊叫？

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或某一段时间正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的背景动作，常与when/while/as引导的时间状语连用

examples.en: While my friend was reading in bed, two thieves climbed into his kitchen.
examples.zh: 当我的朋友躺在床上看书时，两个贼爬进了他的厨房。

examples.en: George was reading when the thieves entered.
examples.zh: 贼进入时乔治正在看书。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时间之前已经完成的动作，即'过去的过去'
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述在另一个过去动作之前发生的动作，常与after/before/when等连用

examples.en: After they had entered the house, they went into the dining room.
examples.zh: 他们进入房子之后，走进了餐厅。

examples.en: The thieves had already gone when George came downstairs.
examples.zh: 乔治下楼时贼们已经跑了。

grammar.title: 过去进行时与过去完成时的区别
grammar.definition: 过去进行时强调动作在进行中，过去完成时强调动作已经完成
grammar.structure: 过去进行时: was/were + doing / 过去完成时: had + done
grammar.usage: 过去进行时通常作背景（持续性动作），过去完成时作主要事件（已完成动作）

examples.en: While George was reading (背景动作), the thieves entered (主要动作).
examples.zh: 当乔治正在看书时（进行中的背景动作），贼们进来了（主要动作）。

examples.en: After they had entered (过去的过去), they went into the dining room.
examples.zh: 在他们进入之后（过去的过去），他们走进餐厅。

sentencePatterns.pattern: While + 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing...

original.en: While my friend, George, was reading in bed, two thieves climbed into his kitchen.
original.zh: 当我的朋友乔治躺在床上看书时，两个贼爬进了他的厨房。

imitations.en: While I was cooking dinner, the phone rang.
imitations.zh: 当我正在做晚饭时，电话响了。

imitations.en: While she was sleeping, someone knocked at the door.
imitations.zh: 当她正在睡觉时，有人敲门。

sentencePatterns.pattern: After + 主语 + had + 过去分词...

original.en: After they had entered the house, they went into the dining room.
original.zh: 他们进入房子之后，走进了餐厅。

imitations.en: After I had finished my homework, I watched TV.
imitations.zh: 我完成作业之后看了电视。

imitations.en: After he had left, we started the meeting.
imitations.zh: 他离开之后，我们开始了会议。

sentencePatterns.pattern: ...as + 副词最高级 + as + 主语 + could

original.en: The thieves dropped the torch and ran away as quickly as they could.
original.zh: 贼们扔下手电筒尽快地逃跑了。

imitations.en: She ran as fast as she could to catch the bus.
imitations.zh: 她尽快地跑着去赶公交车。

imitations.en: They worked as hard as they could to finish the project.
imitations.zh: 他们尽可能努力地工作以完成项目。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + turn on/off + 宾语

imitations.en: He turned off the TV before leaving.
